channel.title: 2026-01-26 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-01-26 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Powering Quantum Computation with Quantum Batteries
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. X
👤 Yaniv Kurman, Kieran Hymas, Arkady Fedorov, William J. Munro, and James Quach
Author(s): Yaniv Kurman, Kieran Hymas, Arkady Fedorov, William J. Munro, and James Quach A framework is introduced to power universal quantum computation with internal quantum batteries, reducing heat load and wiring overhead to potentially increase qubit density fourfold. [Phys. Rev. X 16, 011016] Published Mon Jan 26, 2026
